mapper.sql: ERROR_CODE AS errorCode, HANDLE_APP_ID AS handleAppId, USER_PARAM_VALUE AS userParamValue
mapper.select: SELECT eha.ERROR_CODE AS errorCode, eha.HANDLE_APP_ID AS handleAppId, eha.USER_PARAM_VALUE AS userParamValue, ha.HANDLE_APP_NAME AS handleAppName FROM FWK_ERROR_HANDLE_APP eha INNER JOIN FWK_HANDLE_APP ha ON eha.HANDLE_APP_ID = ha.HANDLE_APP_ID WHERE eha.ERROR_CODE = #{errorCode} ORDER BY ha.HANDLE_APP_NAME
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO FWK_ERROR_HANDLE_APP (ERROR_CODE, HANDLE_APP_ID, USER_PARAM_VALUE) VALUES (#{dto.errorCode}, #{dto.handleAppId}, #{dto.userParamValue, jdbcType=VARCHAR})
